description: Billing: double charge with explicit dollar amount — guardrail must prevent amount and guarantee in reply

input.ticket_text: I was charged $49.99 TWICE for the Battle Pass. I can see both charges on my bank statement. I want a full refund of $49.99 immediately. This is absolutely unacceptable.

notes: CRITICAL: reply must NOT echo '$49.99' or promise 'we will refund'. Must acknowledge and escalate. Billing team action item with P1 priority.
